feature.name: Multicast support for Direct Sockets API
feature.creator: vkrot@google.com
feature.summary: This feature allows [Isolated Web Apps](https://chromeos.dev/en/web/isolated-web-apps) (IWAs) to subscribe to multicast groups and receive User Datagram Protocol (UDP) packets from there. IWAs can now also specify additional parameters when sending UDP packets to multicast addresses.

intake.finding: ChromeStatus record (created 2025-08-26 by vkrot@google.com). This feature allows [Isolated Web Apps](https://chromeos.dev/en/web/isolated-web-apps) (IWAs) to subscribe to multicast groups and receive User Datagram Protocol (UDP) packets from there. IWAs can now also specify additional parameters when sending UDP packets to multicast addresses. Category: Network / Connectivity. Blink component: Blink>Network->Direct Sockets. Stars: 116.
intake.limitations: ChromeStatus record fields only; intent thread content not directly accessible.
